transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
Today, I am here to fish
I'm going to catch a gigantic fish
I will catch at least 10 fish
What is this?
[Unstable]
Just catch any fish
Do you think I can do it?
Sure
[Making the lures]
[Come this way!]
[Shrimp as a bait]
I'm not good at this
It's my first time throwing it in How do I do it?
[Viewers: Please catch 1. This will be on YouTube] You guys don't think I will catch one
I will catch 10

[Viewer: Catch a whale and I'll donate 1000 star balloons]
How do I catch a whale here? Change the mission to 'shark'
1000 star balloons if I catch a shark?
Amazing
I caught 1 already
[Who am I? Where am I?]
I got it right away
[That was easy]
The bait is gone
It dined and dashed
[Fish are fishing Tzuayng]
They just took the bait Very sneaky
Please take the bait, over
I just saw it eat my bait
[Viewers: It's free samples. Just do a shrimp mukbang] I've been robbed
They're so good at this

I'll just think to myself that I came here to feed the fish
Don't just nibble on it Take the bait!
It's here
Bite it, it's delicious
That one is huge I want to eat it
The shrimp is gone
They're just enjoying my bait
[Viewer: Don't eat the shrimp. Put it on the hook]
I did not eat the shrimp! It was on the hook
[I am not stealing fish's food]
Stop dining and dashing you pigs!
I'm getting mad
I will catch it this time
I got it!
It's huge!
[Finally!]

It's very big
[Viewer: It's a baby :'(] No, it's not a baby!
It's all grown up!
Hi baby
You look tasty
Yay, I got 1
How do I take it out of the hook?
It's so fresh
Step on it
I did it
[Happy] It's moving!
[Viewer: Unlucky fish] What do you mean 'unlucky'!?
[Tzuyang's belly is spacious]
[Viewers: Special guest? Ma'am, it's not time yet!]
Oh my! What is that!?
[Came to say hello]

[Viewers: Did she put the fish in her hook? Where did she come from?]
[Viewer: She finished her part-time job]
[What is it this time?]
[Insect]
Why are you even filming that?
Where did it go?
I can't fish anymore
[I was hungry anyway] Can I have brisket soybean stew,
Special sushi,
Cold spicy raw fish soup? Just like the cold noodles?
Stir fried pork with kimchi too, please
I want some fish as well
I'll take a grilled fish as well
[Special sushi]
[Brisket soybean stew]
Stupid little mosquito, I got you

[Stir-fried spicy pork with kimchi]
I'm so hungry
[Grilled fish]
I'm so excited, it's been a while Coming to a restaurant to order the entire menu
[Cold noodles with sliced raw fish with special spicy sauce]
Thank you, this is the sushi? Thank you
Buckwheat noodles?
[Stir-fried spicy pork with kimchi]
[Rock cod, Marbled Rockfish, Hairtail]
Brisket soybean stew (only for 2 people and up) This is 2 servings?
Bon Appetit
There's buckwheat noodles
Also sliced raw fish meat
It's like a cold spicy buckwheat noodles with sashimi
Wasabi attack!
I'm weak to wasabi

My nose stings
That looks very delicious
I've been craving this
A little bit of rice
This tastes so good, the sushi is out of sight
It's been a while since I had Korean traditional dishes
Stir-fried pork too
Everything tastes so..
It's like they were made at home
Tasty
The taste..
I can't explain it
Sashimi with spicy sauce
Sashimi with spicy sauce..
You can kind of taste the buckwheat
The noodles are too long!

Natural hairtail fish
Let's try it Dip it in soy sauce
All hairtail fish are natural?
Didn't know
I really love this fish
I love it
The stew is the best
The 3 in the front are my top 3 picks
Shrimp!
Rock cod
I wish someone was here to separate the meat from the bones for me
I can eat 3 bowls of rice with this stew alone
Octopus
Rip out the tail
That was easy
Looks very similar to the Rock Cod

Yummy!
They taste different
Croaker. It tastes like a croaker
It's like "chop chop chop"
It's very chewy
I have to eat it with rice?
[Okay]
Excuse me, may I have more rice?
Thank you
[Getting every last piece]
Hot!
Get a piece
Put it on top
Season it a bit with the stew
Soybean stew
[Perfect]

There's a lot of fish
How do I explain this?
I really don't know
It feels like I can explain it
But I don't remember it
[2 bowls of rice down]
Should I get 1 more bowl of rice?
Let's finish the sushi first
Only 1 piece of hairtail fish left
Let's eat something else first
Excuse me,
May I have 1 more bowl of rice?
Thank you
It's very easy to take out the bones on the hairtail fish The others are very difficult
Eating a hairtail fish is very easy
This one is the best I just want to eat this

The other fish tasted great, but the hairtail is the best
Out of the fish
I will stop eating here
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
